name: Mock Hollandaise Sauce (Low Cholesterol)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, whisk together all ingredients.
2. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until smooth and thick.
3. Do not boil the mixture.
4. Serve over vegetables or fish.
5. Makes 1 1/2 cups; contains 5 mg cholesterol per tablespoon.
